allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -H 'mcp-session-id: __TRACKED_VAR__' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"test","version":"1.0"}}}')
